title: Amtech T1200C 38mm Solid Brass Padlock, Small Padlock with Keys for Luggage, Lockers, Toolboxes, Cupboards or Sports Bags
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 32mm brass padlock has a heavy duty, corrosion resistant solid brass body with a hardened steel shackle and can be used both indoors and outdoors
MANY APPLICATIONS: It is perfect for securing suitcases, sports bags, rucksacks, lockers, cupboards, toolboxes, etc
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description The Amtech range of small padlocks with keys, will always keep your valuables and belongings safe and secure, thanks to the tough heavy-duty solid brass body. Supplied with 3 keys as standard and also features a hardened steel shackle for added peace of mind. Suitable and flexible enough to use on a variety of security applications in your home, workplace or when you are on the move. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your security requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Do not forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
